final_prompt.prompt:
Create a marketing poster (小红书 cover) for a pearl milk tea product, styled in a pink girly aesthetic with a summer refreshing vibe.

Style/medium: flat pastel illustration with soft watercolor texture, kawaii editorial product shot, inspired by Japanese dessert brand visuals
Composition: vertical portrait frame, centered product hero shot, slight top-down angle, generous white/pink negative space around subject
Subject: a tall clear cup of pearl milk tea with visible tapioca pearls, condensation droplets on the cup surface, pastel pink straw, topped with creamy foam
Scene/backdrop: soft pink gradient background with scattered summer elements — small flowers, ice cubes, or pearl accents as floating props
Lighting/mood: bright diffused daylight, airy and cheerful, cool-toned highlights to reinforce summer refreshing feel
Color palette: dominant blush pink and milky white, pearl beige as mid-tone, mint or baby blue as cool accent for refreshing contrast
Materials/textures: dewy condensation on cup, translucent liquid with floating pearls, soft matte background
Avoid: dark backgrounds, harsh shadows, overly realistic gritty textures, cluttered layout, generic stock-photo flatness
